project_summary.name: BRAF 药物设计
project_summary.objective:
BRAF ATP pocket represented by 3OG7 ligand 032 in the kinase active site.
优先满足 SAR：Maintain hinge and DFG-pocket complementarity
重点监控 ADMET：solubility

target.name: BRAF
target.summary: RAF-family kinase target, especially relevant for V600E mutant cancers.
target.pocket_summary: BRAF ATP pocket represented by 3OG7 ligand 032 in the kinase active site.

grid_box.method: RCSB ligand heavy-atom bounding box with 8 A padding

target_sar_rules.title: Maintain hinge and DFG-pocket complementarity
target_sar_rules.rationale: BRAF inhibitors rely on hinge binding plus hydrophobic pocket occupancy.
target_sar_rules.avoid: Large polar groups buried in the hydrophobic kinase pocket.

target_sar_rules.title: Watch pan-RAF and paradoxical activation hypotheses
target_sar_rules.rationale: BRAF design decisions should track isoform selectivity signals.
target_sar_rules.preferred_change: Add selectivity notes when changing type-I/type-II binding features.
target_sar_rules.avoid: Treating kinase docking score as sufficient selectivity evidence.

target_admet_risks.signal: Hydrophobic kinase scaffolds often carry low solubility risk.
target_admet_risks.mitigation: Use solvent-facing polarity and monitor TPSA/logP together.

target_admet_risks.signal: Aromatic-rich kinase inhibitors can show CYP liability.
target_admet_risks.mitigation: Flag CYP3A4 and CYP2D6 predictions in ranking.

routes.route_summary: Surrogate route found in 2 steps with 2 buyable blocks.

route_plan.operation: Select purchasable aromatic/heteroatom fragments matching the target scaffold.
route_plan.output: Buyable fragment set for analog synthesis.
route_plan.rationale: Keeps the proposed route anchored to available starting materials.

route_plan.operation: Elaborate a compact core through one main C-C or C-N bond-forming step.
route_plan.rationale: Approximates the main bond-forming step from ring count and heteroatom pattern.

route_plan.operation: Install polarity, solubility, or binding-pocket substituents.
route_plan.rationale: Leaves SAR-sensitive substituents late so optimization remains flexible.

route_risks: No major surrogate route risk detected.

evidence_chain.rationale: Binding site: BRAF ATP hinge pocket PDB: 3OG7 reference ligand: 032 A 1 Grid center: [1.869, -2.638, -19.918] size: [24.305, 13.133, 14.396] angstrom Key residues: ALA481:A, ASP594:A, CYS532:A, GLN530:A, GLY534:A, GLY593:A, GLY596:A, ILE463:A, ILE527:A, LEU505
Target ADMET risks: - solubility: Hydrophobic kinase scaffolds often carry low solubility risk.

refutation_chain.reason: Self-refutation for MOL-D87CC67DED: overall=68.79, con=14.2, decision=watch; refutation_con_score=20.39, decision=pass. Counter-evidence checked: no major counter-evidence found.
